MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Nader Kaileh is present.
Attorney Joseph Sacramento appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Kelvie Carpenter is present.
Attorney Olivia Jenq representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Ora Prochovick, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of APR-23-2012 is vacated.
